name: StrikeZone
tagline: Live MLB pitch data on your glasses
description: See the strike zone and live pitch data for MLB games — the broadcast view you miss when you're at the park.
author: StrikeZone
changelog: SPLITS panel now alternates between career head-to-head stats and the batter's in-game line (hits, AB, walks) on each pitch. Fixed a network whitelist omission that caused the v1.3.0 submission to be rejected.

permissions.name: network
permissions.desc: Fetch live MLB game data from the MLB Stats API
